rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
fill: rgb(179, 179, 179); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 66px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 74px;
